summary: Audience-sourced recording praised for great sound despite lack of performance details
review: The sole five‑star review enthusiastically favors the audience tape, calling it "great sound" and even joking that an AUD source beats a soundboard. No comments are made about the musical execution or specific songs, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review is available; it rates the recording highly and praises its audience source, but provides no insight into the performance itself.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer highlights that the audience recording sounds great and prefers it over a soundboard source.
